    "support_priceInfo_as_list_of_date/close_dicts": partially_true
  },

    "Normalization of field name differences in API payload: code2 expects a 'Close' column but many tests/mocks use 'close' (lowercase). There is no explicit normalization/rename from 'close' to 'Close', so fetch_nse_data may KeyError or return incorrect columns for payloads that use lowercase keys.",
    "Support for multiple shapes of 'priceInfo': some test mocks used 'priceInfo' as a dict with direct keys (e.g. {'Close':..., 'Open':...}) while others used it as a list of dated records ({'date':..., 'close':...}).   ]
